metadata.total_forecast_note: Where available, total_tfr is anchored to the local author ML/GP/UCM forecast used by the SKR page.
metadata.gap_forecast_note: Urban and rural TFR are reconstructed from total_tfr and a positive rural/suburban premium forecast. The premium may converge but is not allowed to cross below zero, so a higher rural/suburban share cannot reduce scenario TFR.
metadata.baseline_share_note: baseline_rural_share uses the local settlement baseline share trajectory already present in settlement_data.json.
